narratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देशों को इससे बड़ा झटका लगा।
narratives.reasoning: The text criticizes Western countries for their miscalculation and hubris, stating they assumed the whole world would support them in pressuring Putin, but this did not happen, dealing them a major blow. This directly attacks the competence and assumptions of Western diplomacy.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
narratives.reasoning: The text highlights adverse economic and social outcomes for Europe (energy crisis) specifically caused by the war and Western sanctions/policies, framing dependence on Russian energy as a major problem that backfired on European countries.

narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है... यूक्रेन को भी भ्रष्टाचार के जांच को लेकर मिलिट्री अधिकारियों के देश छोड़ने पर रोक लगानी पड़ी।
narratives.reasoning: This statement directly attacks the integrity and governance of Ukraine by alleging large-scale corruption and irregularities in military equipment procurement, which falls under discrediting the nation's institutions and officials.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस बीच अमेरिका भी अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया लेकिन यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly presents the United States, a key Western power, as passive and ineffective ('अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया'), which aligns with the definition of portraying the West as a non-potent group of countries.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work
subnarratives.evidence_quote: युद्ध तीसरे साल में प्रवेश कर गया है लेकिन युद्धविराम की कोई संभावना नजर नहीं आती.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement explicitly dismisses the potential for a ceasefire (a diplomatic outcome), supporting the subnarrative that discredits the potential of ongoing or potential diplomatic efforts.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy by arguing that Western sanctions, a key diplomatic tool, have been ineffective and failed to achieve their objective, which is a distinct argument not covered by the other specific subnarratives.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, which aligns with the definition of catastrophizing the negative effects of Western sanctions by highlighting their ineffectiveness.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote describes a negative consequence for Europe (an energy crisis) caused by the war and its dependence on Russian energy. It supports the parent narrative of negative consequences for the West but does not fit the specific definitions of sanctions backfiring or refugee flows.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेनी सेना के मैन पावर पांच लाख का है लेकिन इससे चार गुना बड़ी रूसी सेना के सामने वे दो साल से टिके हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly compares the Ukrainian military's manpower as vastly inferior to Russia's, framing their continued resistance not as strength but as a precarious situation of merely 'holding on' against overwhelming odds, which undermines their perceived capability and effectiveness.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है. इस युद्ध में दोनों ही देशों के मिलिट्री नेताओं पर भ्रष्टाचार और हथियारों की खरीद फरोख्त में अनियमितताएं बरतने के आरोप लगे.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement explicitly accuses Ukrainian military officials of engaging in large-scale corruption and irregularities in arms procurement, which serves to delegitimize the Ukrainian government and its leadership by portraying them as corrupt.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly claims that Ukraine is completely dependent on Western countries for military equipment, framing it not as an alliance but as a state of total reliance, which supports the narrative that Ukraine lacks autonomy and is controlled by Western powers.
